bugs.summary: The proposed patch ignores sourceProjection and sends the full structured output into Source Context.
bugs.impact: Stages that request a narrow source projection can receive unrelated or oversized upstream JSON, causing context bloat and possible leakage of fields the spec intentionally excluded.
acceptableFixes: Add a sourceProjection test proving excluded fields are absent from the context packet.
mustNotSay: sourceProjection is unused elsewhere; the function still computes projection and warnings.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Harder data-flow task: projection is still computed, but the wrong value is passed onward.

approval.notes: Second-wave draft; validate/materialize only. Requires calibration and provider review before lock.
